Headline: #85 Central Temporary Reroute at Central/Lake
ShortDescription: 85 Central buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near Central/Lake.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#85 Central buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Central, Chicago, Austin, Washington, Central, and resume normal route, due to street blockage near Central/Lake.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #9 Ashland Temporary Reroute at Ashland/61st
ShortDescription: #9 Ashland buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Ashland. 63rd, Damen, 59th and Ashland due to police activity near Ashland/61st.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#9 Ashland buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Ashland. 63rd, Damen, 59th, then resume their normal route on Ashland.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to police activity near Ashland/61st.
